response.justification: Deep, broad software engineering background (15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js, AWS CDK, testing discipline, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years specifically building production-grade AI/GenAI solutions, and the resume shows only recent, lightly-described AI work with no concrete evidence of RAG, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks, evaluation pipelines, or Python depth. A maybe — worth a screen to probe the recent agentic/MCP work, but the core GenAI requirement appears unmet on paper.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS (CDK) experience with production-scale systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Demonstrated technical leadership: mentoring, workshops, talks, and craftsmanship practices
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI/AI solutions
Missing required RAG, vector database, and data-pipeline experience for unstructured data
Python (a key listed language) and multi-agent frameworks not demonstrated
